title: arabis divaricarpa var. interposita
intro: Arabis divaricarpa var. interposita, also known as rockcress, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. The health benefits of rockcress include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to support the immune system. Rockcress can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in salad dressings and as a garnish for its peppery flavor.
